channel.title: disney pixar lightyear on Neueste Angebote

item.title: Disney Pixar Lightyear - Disney and Pixar Lightyear Playset with Buzz Lightyear Action Figure and Vehicle Launch Ramp and Sounds Ultimate Star Command Base
item.description: Sie können Disney Pixar Lightyear - Disney and Pixar Lightyear Playset with Buzz Lightyear Action Figure and Vehicle Launch Ramp and Sounds Ultimate Star Command Base hier: ℹ️: ​On the left side is a double barreled blaster, projectile storage, working door and tech bay. Platforms on either side provide for safety lookouts. ​On the right are storage areas for fuel cells, weapons and gear, sold separately and subject to availability. ​Relive the excitement of Disney and Pixars Lightyear, with this expansive playset full of features inspired by the movie – the Ultimate Star Command Base!
